name: delete_record
description: Permanently delete one or more records from an Airtable table by their record IDs. You can delete up to 10 records per request by passing multiple record IDs as query parameters. This action is irreversible.

parameters.name: baseId
parameters.description: The ID of the base containing the table (starts with 'app').

parameters.name: tableIdOrName
parameters.description: The ID or URL-encoded name of the table containing the records.

parameters.name: records[]
parameters.description: The IDs of the records to delete. Pass multiple times for multiple records (max 10).
